jsonLd.title: Lenskart is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lenskart family as a E-commerce Executive in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lenskart:
Lenskart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
